title: RevenueCat — uploading App Store Connect P8 key for Brotein paywall (filename validation error)
html:
RevenueCat dashboard at app.revenuecat.com — BroteinOfficialPaywall project, In-app purchase key configuration screen for the App Store transactions integration. Yahir got an error: "Invalid file name, it should be SubscriptionKey_XXXXXXXXXX.p8. A file name with any other prefix could be a private key for a different Apple service." — needs to re-download the right P8 from App Store Connect (subscription key, not a generic API key). Form fields: Key ID (e.g. ABC123DEFG) and Issuer ID (UUID).

TL;DR

  • RevenueCat BroteinOfficialPaywall integration needs the SubscriptionKey_*.p8 file specifically — Yahir uploaded the wrong P8 prefix.
  • Key ID + Issuer ID required after the P8 upload — both come from App Store Connect → Users and Access → Keys → In-App Purchase.
  • This is the integration plumbing that lets RevenueCat pull accurate country-specific pricing for Brotein Premium.

revenuecat · brotein · app store connect
